title: No date-range filtering on match queries — only season/year supported
evidence: src/mcp.rs:46 search_matches inputSchema has 'season' (integer) but no 'date_start'/'date_end' params; queries.rs:26 MatchFilter has season: Option<i32> but no date fields. Spec R4 requires 'filter by date range and/or season'.
suggestion: Add optional date_start/date_end string params to search_matches and filter matches where m.date falls within the range.
